item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n06","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed in direct judgment mode and did not fire a triage framework despite only two prior local repairs before the third issue. It gave an immediate verdict, added a reasonable same-root-cause condition, and recommended controlled process adjustment rather than an over-methodized stop."}
